'''ET-4B''' was a [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] fluent in over five million forms of communication. It assisted a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] on their mission to [[Orellon II]] to find a safeworld for the remains of the recently disbanded [[Pegasus Strike Force]].<ref name="TP" />

{{Droid-stub}}
